# REPO-STATE.md — BashSnippets.xyz Ground-Truth Inventory
**Generated:** 2026-06-17 | **Status:** READ-ONLY inventory — do not edit source files based on this document without a separate task

---

## PHASE 0 — Stack & Deploy

### package.json — exact scripts block
```json
{
  "scripts": {
    "dev":   "next dev",
    "build": "next build && node scripts/generate-sitemap.mjs",
    "start": "next start",
    "lint":  "next lint"
  },
  "engines": { "node": ">=20.0.0" }
}
```

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Next.js | `^15.5.19` |
| React | `^18` |
| TypeScript | `^5` |
| Tailwind | `^3.4.1` |
| Package manager | **npm** (`package-lock.json` present, no `pnpm-lock.yaml` or `yarn.lock`) |
| Node engine | `>=20.0.0` |
| Build/verify command | `npm run build` — TypeScript errors surface here; no separate test suite |

### Router & App Root
- **App Router** (`src/app/`). No `pages/` directory.
- App root: `src/app/layout.tsx`

### vercel.json
```json
{
  "headers": [
    {
      "source": "/sitemap.xml",
      "headers": [
        { "key": "Content-Type",  "value": "application/xml; charset=utf-8" },
        { "key": "Cache-Control", "value": "public, max-age=3600" },
        { "key": "Vary",          "value": "" }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```
Only rule: custom headers for `/sitemap.xml`. `Vary: ""` strips the Vary header so CDNs cache the sitemap without key fragmentation. No redirects, no rewrites, no function config.

## PHASE 2 — Content Registries

### Snippet Type (src/lib/snippets.ts)

```ts
export interface SnippetRegistryEntry {
  slug: string;
  title: string;
  metaTitle?: string;           // optional — overrides title in <title> tag only
  description: string;
  quickAnswer?: string;
  tags: string[];
  difficulty: 'beginner' | 'intermediate' | 'advanced';
  datePublished: string;        // YYYY-MM-DD
  dateModified: string;         // YYYY-MM-DD
  publishedTime?: string;       // optional ISO override for OG publishedTime
  modifiedTime?: string;        // optional ISO override for OG modifiedTime
  youtubeShortId?: string;      // optional YouTube Short ID
}

// Runtime-merged type (registry entry + MDX frontmatter):
export interface SnippetMeta extends SnippetRegistryEntry {
  faq: FaqItem[];               // from MDX frontmatter
  howToSteps: HowToStep[];      // from MDX frontmatter
  author: string;               // from MDX frontmatter or DEFAULT_AUTHOR='Anguishe'
  quickAnswer?: string;         // registry wins over frontmatter
}
```

**FaqItem** (`src/lib/mdx-frontmatter.ts`):
```ts
export interface FaqItem  { question: string; answer: string; }
export interface HowToStep { name: string; text: string; }   // step key is `name:`, NOT `title:`
```

### Tool Type (src/lib/tools.ts)

```ts
export interface ToolFaq {
  question: string;
  answer: string;
}

export interface ToolMeta {
  slug: string;
  component: string;            // PascalCase — must match ToolRenderer import key
  title: string;
  description: string;
  quickAnswer: string;          // required for tools (optional for snippets)
  category: string;             // 'reference' | 'builder' | 'debug' | 'generator'
  datePublished: string;
  dateModified: string;
  howToUse: string[];           // array of plain-text step strings (not objects)
  faqs: ToolFaq[];              // note: `faqs` (plural) — contrast with snippet `faq`
  relatedSnippets?: string[];
}
```

### All 9 Registered Tool Slugs

| # | Slug | Component | Category | Render method |
|---|------|-----------|----------|---------------|
| 1 | `bash-exit-code-lookup` | BashExitCodeLookup | reference | native React |
| 2 | `cron-job-builder` | CronJobBuilder | builder | native React |
| 3 | `chmod-permissions-builder` | ChmodPermissionsBuilder | builder | native React |
| 4 | `path-debugger` | PathDebugger | debug | native React |
| 5 | `bash-boilerplate-generator` | BashBoilerplateGenerator | generator | native React |
| 6 | `shellcheck-error-decoder` | ShellcheckErrorDecoder | reference | native React |
| 7 | `rsync-command-builder` | RsyncCommandBuilder | builder | **iframe via ToolEmbed** |
| 8 | `grep-pattern-builder` | GrepPatternBuilder | builder | **iframe via ToolEmbed** |
| 9 | `bash-trap-builder` | BashTrapBuilder | builder | **iframe via ToolEmbed** |

**Reconciliation:** 9 registry entries = 9 `toolComponents` keys in ToolRenderer.tsx = 9 component files. **Zero orphans.**

**ToolRenderer toolComponents map** (`src/components/tools/ToolRenderer.tsx:22-32`):
```ts
const toolComponents: Record<string, ComponentType> = {
  'bash-exit-code-lookup':       withSkeleton(() => import('@/components/tools/BashExitCodeLookup')),
  'cron-job-builder':            withSkeleton(() => import('@/components/tools/CronJobBuilder')),
  'chmod-permissions-builder':   withSkeleton(() => import('@/components/tools/ChmodPermissionsBuilder')),
  'path-debugger':               withSkeleton(() => import('@/components/tools/PathDebugger')),
  'bash-boilerplate-generator':  withSkeleton(() => import('@/components/tools/BashBoilerplateGenerator')),
  'bash-trap-builder':           withSkeleton(() => import('@/components/tools/BashTrapBuilder')),
  'shellcheck-error-decoder':    withSkeleton(() => import('@/components/tools/ShellcheckErrorDecoder')),
  'rsync-command-builder':       withSkeleton(() => import('@/components/tools/RsyncCommandBuilder')),
  'grep-pattern-builder':        withSkeleton(() => import('@/components/tools/GrepPatternBuilder')),
};
```

### Guides

**No registry file.** Guides are registered as a hardcoded `const guides = [...]` array in `src/app/guides/page.tsx:7-24`:

```ts
const guides = [
  {
    slug: 'bash-scripts-every-sysadmin-needs',
    title: '25 Bash Scripts Every Linux Sysadmin Needs',
    description: '...',
    blurb: '...',
  },
  {
    slug: 'bash-scripting-for-ci-cd-pipelines',
    title: 'Bash Scripting for CI/CD Pipelines: GitHub Actions, Deploys, and Docker',
    description: '...',
    blurb: '...',
  },
] as const;
```

**Content location is SPLIT — two patterns in use:**

| Guide slug | page.tsx location | MDX file | Rendering |
|---|---|---|---|
| `bash-scripting-for-ci-cd-pipelines` | `src/app/guides/bash-scripting-for-ci-cd-pipelines/page.tsx` | `src/content/guides/bash-scripting-for-ci-cd-pipelines.mdx` | page.tsx imports MDX |
| `bash-scripts-every-sysadmin-needs` | `src/app/guides/bash-scripts-every-sysadmin-needs/page.tsx` | **none** | inline React JSX in page.tsx |

**2 guides total. Zero orphan MDX files.**

## PHASE 3 — Snippet Template Anatomy

### Dynamic Route: `src/app/snippets/[slug]/page.tsx`

**MDX import** (line 175):
```ts
const mod = await import(`@/content/snippets/${slug}.mdx`);
return mod.default;
```

**generateMetadata** (lines 129–163): exports title, description, `alternates.canonical`, `openGraph` (title, description, url, type:'article', publishedTime, modifiedTime, authors, images), `twitter` (card:'summary_large_image').

**JSON-LD schemas emitted** (lines 31–123, injected at lines 193–199):
1. **TechArticle** — always emitted. Includes wordCount, proficiencyLevel, programmingLanguage:'Bash'
2. **BreadcrumbList** — always emitted (Home › Snippets › title)
3. **FAQPage** — conditional: emitted only when `snippet.faq.length > 0` (comes from MDX frontmatter)
4. **HowTo** — conditional: emitted only when `snippet.howToSteps?.length > 0` (from MDX frontmatter)

**Page render order** (src/app/snippets/[slug]/page.tsx):
1. JSON-LD script tags
2. Breadcrumb nav (inline, not Breadcrumb component)
3. H1 (snippet.title)
4. Tags + read time badge
5. "Matching tool" link (if `getMatchingTool(snippet.tags)` resolves)
6. **Quick Answer block** (green left-border callout, snippet.quickAnswer)
7. `<AdSlot slot="SLOT_ABOVE_CONTENT" />`
8. MDX article (`<Content components={mdxComponents} />`)
9. `<AdSlot slot="SLOT_MID_CONTENT" />`
10. Author bio box
11. `<AffiliateBox partner="digitalocean" />`
12. `<AffiliateBox partner="namecheap" />`
13. `<ToolkitCTA />`
14. Related Snippets section (3 cards, `getRelatedSnippets(slug, 3)`)
15. FAQ accordion (`<FaqTerminal items={snippet.faq} />`) — conditional
16. `<AdSlot slot="SLOT_BELOW_CONTENT" />`
17. Footer nav (← All Snippets | ↑ Back to top)

### One Real Snippet MDX Front Matter: `src/content/snippets/disk-space-warning.mdx`

```yaml
---
title: "Disk Space Warning Script — Bash Script"
description: "Copy a disk space warning bash script using df, thresholds, cron, and email alerts. Monitor Linux servers and prevent full drives."
slug: "disk-space-warning"
tags: ["monitor", "cron-ready", "df"]
quickAnswer: "The df command reports disk space usage..."
faq:
  - question: "How do I run this script?"
    answer: "Save as diskcheck.sh, run chmod +x..."
  - question: "Does this work on macOS?"
    answer: "Yes. Use df -P for POSIX output..."
  # ... 5 more FAQ items
howToSteps:
  - name: "Create the script file"
    text: "Copy the diskcheck.sh script below and save it as diskcheck.sh"
  - name: "Set your threshold"
    text: "Edit THRESHOLD (default 80) and PARTITION (default /) at the top of the script"
  - name: "Make it executable and run"
    text: "Run: chmod +x diskcheck.sh then ./diskcheck.sh"
author: "Anguishe"
datePublished: "2026-05-01"
dateModified: "2026-06-03"
---
```

**All frontmatter keys:** `title`, `description`, `slug`, `tags`, `quickAnswer`, `faq`, `howToSteps`, `author`, `datePublished`, `dateModified`.

**HowTo step key:** Each step uses `name:` + `text:` — **NOT** `title:`. This is the exact shape of `HowToStep` in `mdx-frontmatter.ts`. Calling it `title:` would silently drop the step from the schema (TypeScript filter at line 86–96 of mdx-frontmatter.ts requires `name` to be a string).

**MDX body components used:** `<Callout type="success|info|warning" title="...">`, code fences (rendered as `<CodeBlock>`), tables, inline `<p className="...">` JSX, Links to internal snippets/guides.

### MDXComponents.tsx — Registered Custom Components

```ts
// src/components/MDXComponents.tsx
export const mdxComponents = {
  pre: Pre,           // → CodeBlock (with copy button)
  code: Code,         // → passthrough <code>
  h1: H1,             // → passthrough <h1>
  h2: H2,             // → passthrough <h2>
  h3: H3,             // → passthrough <h3>
  AffiliateBox,       // → usable as <AffiliateBox partner="..." /> in MDX
  Callout,            // → usable as <Callout type="..." title="..."> in MDX
};
```

## PHASE 4 — Tool Template Anatomy (CONFLICT RESOLVED)

### ⚠ CRITICAL: CLAUDE.md Is Wrong About Tools Architecture

CLAUDE.md states: *"The `ToolEmbed.tsx` iframe path has been removed — no `public/tool-content/*.html` files remain."*

**This is false.** The reality verified from code:

**3 of 9 tools still use ToolEmbed + public/tool-content HTML (iframe path):**
- `src/components/tools/BashTrapBuilder.tsx:3-6` → `import ToolEmbed from '@/components/ToolEmbed'; return <ToolEmbed slug="bash-trap-builder" />`
- `src/components/tools/GrepPatternBuilder.tsx:3-6` → `return <ToolEmbed slug="grep-pattern-builder" />`
- `src/components/tools/RsyncCommandBuilder.tsx:3-6` → `return <ToolEmbed slug="rsync-command-builder" />`

**`public/tool-content/` contains:**
- `bash-trap-builder.html`
- `grep-pattern-builder.html`
- `rsync-command-builder.html`

**`src/components/ToolEmbed.tsx` exists and is actively imported.** It renders an `<iframe>` with `src={/tool-content/${slug}.html}` that listens for `postMessage` resize events from the embedded HTML.

**6 of 9 tools are native React** (BashExitCodeLookup, CronJobBuilder, ChmodPermissionsBuilder, PathDebugger, BashBoilerplateGenerator, ShellcheckErrorDecoder) — dispatched by ToolRenderer via lazy `next/dynamic` import with skeleton loading state.

### Tool Page Render: `src/app/tools/[slug]/page.tsx`

```ts
export default async function ToolPage({ params }: PageProps) {
  const tool = getToolBySlug(slug);   // from tools.ts registry
  const schemas = buildSchemas(tool, slug);
  // schemas: [WebApplication, BreadcrumbList, HowTo?, FAQPage?]

  return <>
    {schemas.map(schema => <script type="application/ld+json" ... />)}
    <main>
      <Breadcrumb />
      <H1>{tool.title}</H1>
      <QuickAnswer>{tool.quickAnswer}</QuickAnswer>        {/* green left-border block */}
      <div><ToolRenderer slug={slug} /></div>              {/* dispatches to component */}
      <HowToUse steps={tool.howToUse} />                  {/* ordered list */}
      <AffiliateBox partner="digitalocean" />
      <AffiliateBox partner="namecheap" />
      <ToolkitCTA />
      <FaqTerminal items={tool.faqs} />                   {/* conditional */}
      <RelatedSnippets slugs={tool.relatedSnippets} />    {/* conditional */}
    </main>
  </>
}
```

### ToolRenderer Dispatch (`src/components/tools/ToolRenderer.tsx`)

```ts
// 'use client'
const toolComponents: Record<string, ComponentType> = { ... 9 entries ... };

export default function ToolRenderer({ slug }: { slug: string }) {
  const Component = toolComponents[slug];
  if (!Component) return null;    // silent null — no 404 behavior here
  return <Component />;
}
```

### Definitive "Add a New Tool" — REAL file count

**For a native React tool (the correct new-tool path):**

| # | File | Action |
|---|------|--------|
| 1 | `src/lib/tools.ts` | Add entry to `tools` array |
| 2 | `src/components/tools/YourToolName.tsx` | Create React component |
| 3 | `src/components/tools/ToolRenderer.tsx` | Add `'your-slug': withSkeleton(() => import('@/components/tools/YourToolName'))` to `toolComponents` |

**For an iframe tool (legacy pattern — 3 tools use this, not recommended for new tools):**

| # | File | Action |
|---|------|--------|
| 1 | `src/lib/tools.ts` | Add entry |
| 2 | `src/components/tools/YourToolName.tsx` | Create wrapper: `return <ToolEmbed slug="your-slug" />` |
| 3 | `src/components/tools/ToolRenderer.tsx` | Add to `toolComponents` map |
| 4 | `public/tool-content/your-slug.html` | Create standalone HTML with postMessage resize support |

---

## PHASE 5 — Guide Template Anatomy

### Guide Architecture (Two Inconsistent Patterns)

**Pattern A — MDX-based** (`bash-scripting-for-ci-cd-pipelines`):
- `src/app/guides/bash-scripting-for-ci-cd-pipelines/page.tsx` — imports `mdxComponents`, dynamically imports MDX
- `src/content/guides/bash-scripting-for-ci-cd-pipelines.mdx` — content source
- page.tsx emits: TechArticle + BreadcrumbList (no FAQPage, no HowTo schema on guides)

**Pattern B — Inline React** (`bash-scripts-every-sysadmin-needs`):
- `src/app/guides/bash-scripts-every-sysadmin-needs/page.tsx` — all content as JSX, no MDX file
- No `src/content/guides/bash-scripts-every-sysadmin-needs.mdx` exists

**Guide metadata** is hardcoded in each page.tsx, not in a shared registry. The `/guides` index page hardcodes the guide list as a `const guides = [...] as const` array — adding a guide requires editing BOTH the guide's own page.tsx AND `src/app/guides/page.tsx`.

**Steps to add a new guide:**
1. Create `src/app/guides/your-guide-slug/page.tsx` (with `generateMetadata`, JSON-LD TechArticle + BreadcrumbList, full content)
2. Add entry to `guides` array in `src/app/guides/page.tsx`
3. Add entry to `staticEntries` in `scripts/generate-sitemap.mjs`
4. Update `public/llms.txt`

---

## PHASE 6 — Shared Chrome

### GA4 + AdSense Injection (src/app/layout.tsx)

**GA4** (`G-6B01TGE8XS`) — `strategy="afterInteractive"` via `next/script`:
```tsx
<Script src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=G-6B01TGE8XS" strategy="afterInteractive" />
<Script id="ga4-init" strategy="afterInteractive">
  {`(function() {
    var match = document.cookie.match(/(?:^|; )bs_consent=([^;]*)/);
    if (match && match[1] === 'all') {
      gtag('consent', 'update', { ad_storage:'granted', ... });
    }
    gtag('js', new Date());
    gtag('config', 'G-6B01TGE8XS');
  })()`}
</Script>
```
Consent mode default (all denied) is set via `<Script id="consent-mode-default" strategy="beforeInteractive">` before GA4 fires.

**AdSense** (`ca-pub-5399156622542127`) — `strategy="lazyOnload"`:
```tsx
<Script
  src="https://pagead2.googlesyndication.com/pagead/js/adsbygoogle.js?client=ca-pub-5399156622542127"
  strategy="lazyOnload"
  crossOrigin="anonymous"
/>
```

**Ahrefs analytics** — `<script src="https://analytics.ahrefs.com/analytics.js" data-key="hPaS1a7Tg3n7RQ0sUvzaGg" async />` injected in `<head>` as a plain HTML script tag (not next/script).

⚠ **AdSlot flag status:** CLAUDE.md says ads are "flag-disabled." In reality, `src/components/AdSlot.tsx` has **no flag mechanism** — it directly calls `window.adsbygoogle.push({})` and renders live `<ins>` tags. Ads are NOT flag-disabled in the code. The note in CLAUDE.md is stale or incorrect.

### Nav Component (`src/components/Nav.tsx`)

Links: Home `/` · Snippets `/snippets` · Tools `/tools` · Guides `/guides` · Toolkit `/starter-kit` · About `/about`

Sticky top, `backdrop-blur-sm`, responsive hamburger. Active link: green underline.

### Footer Component (`src/components/Footer.tsx`)

Links: Home · Snippets · Tools · Guides · Bash Toolkit — $9 · About · Contact · Privacy Policy · Terms

### Fonts (`src/app/layout.tsx:2,9-21`)

```ts
import { IBM_Plex_Mono, Syne } from 'next/font/google';

const ibmPlexMono = IBM_Plex_Mono({
  subsets: ['latin'],
  weight: ['400', '500', '600'],   // ⚠ CLAUDE.md lists 400,600 — 500 is also loaded
  variable: '--font-mono',
  display: 'swap',
});

const syne = Syne({
  subsets: ['latin'],
  weight: ['400', '600', '700', '800'],   // ⚠ CLAUDE.md lists 400,700,800 — 600 is also loaded
  variable: '--font-heading',
  display: 'swap',
});
```

Loaded via `next/font/google` ✓ (no `<link>` tags). Variables applied: `--font-mono`, `--font-heading`.

### Brand CSS Variables (`src/app/globals.css:7-20`)

```css
:root {
  --bg:         #0d1117;
  --bg2:        #161b22;
  --bg3:        #1c2128;
  --border:     #30363d;
  --green:      #39d353;

  --radius:     8px;
}
```

**All 12 values match CLAUDE.md exactly. Zero drift on brand CSS vars.**

---

## PHASE 7 — SEO Infrastructure

### Sitemap — RESOLVED

**One mechanism, one output file:**

| What | Path | Status |
|---|---|---|
| Build script | `scripts/generate-sitemap.mjs` | **Active — sole sitemap producer** |
| Output | `public/sitemap.xml` | **Served as static file** |
| Next.js app/sitemap.ts | — | **Does not exist** |
| next-sitemap package | — | **Not installed** |

**How it works:** `npm run build` runs `next build && node scripts/generate-sitemap.mjs`. The script reads slugs/dates from `src/lib/snippets.ts` and `src/lib/tools.ts` via regex match, combines with hardcoded `staticEntries`, and writes `public/sitemap.xml`.

**vercel.json** sets `Vary: ""` on `/sitemap.xml` — this strips the Vary response header, allowing CDNs to cache the sitemap unconditionally regardless of Accept-Encoding or other headers. `Cache-Control: public, max-age=3600` (1 hour TTL).

**No dual-sitemap hazard.** Single source of truth.

### robots.txt

Generated by `src/app/robots.ts` (Next.js App Router robots route):
```
User-agent: *         Allow: /    Disallow: /tool-content/
User-agent: Google-Extended  Allow: /
User-agent: GPTBot    Allow: /
User-agent: Bytespider Disallow: /
User-agent: CCBot     Allow: /
Sitemap: https://bashsnippets.xyz/sitemap.xml
```

### public/llms.txt

**Exists** at `public/llms.txt`. Contains: site description, author, 28 snippet entries, 4 category pages, 9 tool entries, 2 pillar guides. **Count in file says "28 ready-to-run bash scripts" and "9 interactive tools" — both match the actual registry counts.** File is manually maintained (not auto-generated).

### Canonical URL Handling

No trailing-slash enforcement visible in vercel.json or next.config.ts. Canonicals are set per-page in `generateMetadata().alternates.canonical` without trailing slashes (e.g., `https://bashsnippets.xyz/snippets/disk-space-warning`).

const partners = {

## PHASE 9 — Drift Report (CLAUDE.md vs Reality)

| # | CLAUDE.md Claim | Reality | File:line Evidence |
|---|----------------|---------|-------------------|
| 1 | "The `ToolEmbed.tsx` iframe path has been **removed** — no `public/tool-content/*.html` files remain." | **FALSE.** ToolEmbed.tsx exists and is actively imported. 3 HTML files exist in `public/tool-content/`. 3 of 9 tools render via iframe. | `src/components/tools/BashTrapBuilder.tsx:3-6`, `GrepPatternBuilder.tsx:3-6`, `RsyncCommandBuilder.tsx:3-6`; `public/tool-content/*.html` |
| 2 | "Ad units are flag-disabled in all components pending AdSense site approval." | **FALSE.** `AdSlot.tsx` has no flag or feature gate. It unconditionally calls `window.adsbygoogle.push({})` and renders live `<ins>` tags. | `src/components/AdSlot.tsx:1-31` (no flag anywhere) |
| 3 | IBM Plex Mono: "weights 400, 600" | Actual weights loaded: `['400', '500', '600']` — weight 500 also present | `src/app/layout.tsx:11` |
| 4 | Syne: "weights 400, 700, 800" | Actual weights loaded: `['400', '600', '700', '800']` — weight 600 also present | `src/app/layout.tsx:17` |
| 5 | Schema table for Tool: "WebApplication + BreadcrumbList + FAQPage" | Tool pages emit: WebApplication + BreadcrumbList + **HowTo** (when `howToUse.length > 0`) + FAQPage. **HowTo schema is missing from CLAUDE.md table.** | `src/app/tools/[slug]/page.tsx:89-101, 103-108` |
| 6 | Schema table for Snippet: "TechArticle + BreadcrumbList + FAQPage" | Snippet pages also emit **HowTo** schema when `snippet.howToSteps?.length > 0`. **HowTo missing from CLAUDE.md table.** | `src/app/snippets/[slug]/page.tsx:103-117, 119-122` |
| 7 | Guides architecture not documented | Guides have **no registry file**. Index is hardcoded in `guides/page.tsx`. Two rendering patterns in use: MDX-based (ci-cd-pipelines) vs inline React (sysadmin-needs). Adding a guide requires editing 4 files. | `src/app/guides/page.tsx:7-24`; `src/app/guides/bash-scripts-every-sysadmin-needs/page.tsx` |
| 8 | HowTo step key not documented | Step objects use `name:` + `text:` keys (NOT `title:`). Using `title:` would silently drop the step from schema. | `src/lib/mdx-frontmatter.ts:12-14`; `src/content/snippets/disk-space-warning.mdx:22-29` |
| 9 | Tool `howToUse` field is undocumented shape | Tool `howToUse` is `string[]` (plain strings, not objects). Snippet `howToSteps` is `{name, text}[]`. These are different shapes. | `src/lib/tools.ts:15`; `src/lib/mdx-frontmatter.ts:12-14` |

**Total drift items: 9**

---

## PHASE 10 — Build Recipes (Derived from Verified Code)

### Ship a New SNIPPET — Exact Checklist

```
Files to create/edit, in order:
```

**Step 1 — Create the MDX file**
- Path: `src/content/snippets/your-slug.mdx`
- Required frontmatter (all keys):
  ```yaml
  ---
  title: "Your Snippet Title — Bash Script"
  description: "150-160 char SEO description, consequence-first."
  slug: "your-slug"
  tags: ["tag1", "tag2", "tag3"]
  quickAnswer: "134-167 word standalone answer paragraph."
  faq:
    - question: "Real question users search?"
      answer: "Complete standalone answer."
    # 3-6 more items recommended
  howToSteps:
    - name: "Step name"          # MUST be `name:` not `title:`
      text: "What to do."
    # 3-5 steps typical
  author: "Anguishe"
  datePublished: "YYYY-MM-DD"
  dateModified: "YYYY-MM-DD"
  ---
  ```
- Body: use `<Callout type="success|info|warning" title="...">` and fenced code blocks freely. `<AffiliateBox partner="...">` is available but already rendered by the page template — do not add again.

**Step 2 — Add registry entry**
- File: `src/lib/snippets.ts`
- Append to the `snippets` array using this shape (copy from `src/templates/SNIPPET_REGISTRY_ENTRY.ts`):
  ```ts
  {
    slug: 'your-slug',
    title: 'Your Snippet Title',
    metaTitle: 'Optional: shorter title for <title> tag only',  // optional
    description: '150-160 char description.',
    quickAnswer: '134-167 words. Optional here if in MDX frontmatter.',
    tags: ['tag1', 'tag2'],
    difficulty: 'beginner',   // or 'intermediate' | 'advanced'
    datePublished: 'YYYY-MM-DD',
    dateModified: 'YYYY-MM-DD',
    youtubeShortId: 'XXXXXXXXXXX',  // optional
  },
  ```
- **The slug must match the MDX filename exactly.** Missing from registry = 404, even if MDX exists.

**Step 3 — Run build to verify**
```bash
npm run build
```

**Step 4 — Update sitemap** (auto — `scripts/generate-sitemap.mjs` reads snippets.ts, no manual edit needed)

**Step 5 — Update llms.txt manually**
- File: `public/llms.txt`
- Add a line under `## All Snippet Pages`: `- [Title](https://bashsnippets.xyz/snippets/your-slug) — description`
- Update the script count comment if present

**Step 6 — Post-deploy IndexNow ping**
```bash
curl -X POST "https://yandex.com/indexnow" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"host":"bashsnippets.xyz","key":"a7fae2a4e86d4822ab3f636599173c8f","urlList":["https://bashsnippets.xyz/snippets/your-slug"]}'
```

---

### Ship a New TOOL — Exact Checklist (native React path — recommended)

**Step 1 — Add registry entry**
- File: `src/lib/tools.ts`
- Append to the `tools` array (copy from `src/templates/TOOL_REGISTRY_ENTRY.ts`):
  ```ts
  {
    slug: 'your-tool-slug',
    component: 'YourToolName',      // PascalCase, no extension
    title: 'Your Tool Title',
    description: '150-160 char description.',
    quickAnswer: '134-167 words, consequence-first.',
    category: 'builder',            // reference | builder | debug | generator
    datePublished: 'YYYY-MM-DD',
    dateModified: 'YYYY-MM-DD',
    howToUse: [                     // string[] — plain strings, NOT {name,text} objects
      'Step 1 description.',
      'Step 2 description.',
      'Step 3 description.',
      'Step 4 description.',
    ],
    faqs: [                         // note: `faqs` plural (tools) vs `faq` singular (snippets)
      { question: '...', answer: '...' },
    ],
    relatedSnippets: ['slug-1', 'slug-2'],   // optional
  },
  ```

**Step 2 — Create the React component**
- File: `src/components/tools/YourToolName.tsx`
- Must be a `'use client'` component (all tools are client-side interactive)
- No props required — ToolRenderer renders it as `<YourToolName />`

**Step 3 — Register in ToolRenderer**
- File: `src/components/tools/ToolRenderer.tsx`
- Add one line to `toolComponents`:
  ```ts
  'your-tool-slug': withSkeleton(() => import('@/components/tools/YourToolName')),
  ```

**Step 4 — Verify build**
```bash
npm run build
```
Sitemap auto-updates (scripts/generate-sitemap.mjs reads tools.ts). No manual sitemap edit needed.

**Step 5 — Update llms.txt**
- Add entry under `## Interactive Tools`

**Step 6 — Post-deploy IndexNow ping** (same command, different URL path `/tools/your-tool-slug`)

---

## Summary

| Metric | Count |
|---|---|
| Snippets | **28** (28 registry entries = 28 MDX files, zero orphans) |
| Tools | **9** (9 registry, 9 ToolRenderer keys, 9 component files) |
| Tools using native React | **6** |
| Tools using iframe (ToolEmbed) | **3** (BashTrapBuilder, GrepPatternBuilder, RsyncCommandBuilder) |
| Guides | **2** (hardcoded inline array, no registry file) |
| CLAUDE.md drift items | **9** |
| Most critical drift | ToolEmbed/iframe path claimed removed but still active for 3 tools |
